center.name: 薩瓦納-卡馬圭群島
center.summary: 薩瓦納-卡馬圭群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Bahama mockingbird、Oriente warbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of Bahama mockingbird is found in the Bahamas, the Turks and Caicos Islands, and the Sabana-Camagüey Archipelago off Cuba's north coast

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of Oriente warbler is found in the mountains and coast of eastern Cuba and the Sabana-Camagüey Archipelago off the main island's north coast

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of Bahama mockingbird is found in the Bahamas, the Turks and Caicos Islands, and the Sabana-Camagüey Archipelago off Cuba's north coast
